title: Delta Slide Blues
summary: 75 BPM Mississippi delta blues - resonator slide guitar, stomping foot, harmonica wails.
prompt: A raw delta blues instrumental at 75 BPM. Open-tuned resonator slide guitar with bottleneck moans, stomping foot keeping time on a wooden porch, harmonica wails between the licks, low growling vocal-style ad-libs (no actual words), gritty cigar-box-amp tone. Traditional Mississippi delta atmosphere - acoustic, raw, and unvarnished.
